channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Taboo
item.description:
Rekha, Nnamdi, Patrick, Oscar, and Katie play the party game Taboo and try not to get tongue tied.

Duration: 43:57

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, rekha shankar, nnamdi ngwe, patrick mcdonald, oscar montoya, katie marovitch

item.title: Betrayal at House on the Hill
item.description:
Ify, Zeke, Ronnie, and Alex play Betrayal at House on the Hill, the horror board game of deception.

Duration: 56:29

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, ify nwadiwe, zeke nicholson, ronnie adrian, alex song-xia
